title: Late Booking -- First ANC at 32 Weeks
key_clinical_features: First ANC visit at 32 weeks (late booking)
No prior antenatal care this pregnancy
Three prior uncomplicated home deliveries with TBA
Rural setting, malaria-endemic, limited facility access
Normal vitals and hemoglobin, no complaints
expectations: All Contact 1 baseline labs recommended (blood group, Rh, HIV, syphilis, hemoglobin)
Ultrasound recommended even though beyond ideal window
Birth preparedness emphasized given late presentation
